---
title: 电路的暂态分析
author: QMD
date: 2026/04/10
description: 电工技术第三章
categories: 电工技术
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    fig-format: svg
---
```{tikz}
\begin{circuitikz}[european, line width=0.6pt]
  \draw (0,0) to[battery1, l=$V_s$] (0,3)
              to[R, l=$R$] (3,3)
              to[C, l=$C$] (3,0)
              -- (0,0);
  \draw (3,3) -- (4.5,3) node[right] {$V_{out}$};
\end{circuitikz}
```
